report.summary: Sprint 59 / Day 15 cycle closed clean — production deploy healthy (4m 13s), 321 pages live, all 6 API routes structurally sound, one non-blocking TS regression flagged in examples file, and Vercel Pro trial expires in 10 days.

sections.title: QA
items: Build PASSED on Vercel (FmTjefK4y) — 944 log lines, 4m 13s, status: Ready
TypeScript check: 4 errors in src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts (JSX returned from .ts file, not .tsx) — NON-BLOCKING due to ignoreBuildErrors:true, but flagged for fix
321 published pages confirmed in published-pages.ts
No orphaned routes detected — Sprint 59 added 70+ ecosystem pages, 25+ learn guides, 12+ new tool and gamification pages
Publish queue fully cleared — Day 15 promoted 3 learn guides to production
No new regressions introduced — all recently deleted legacy routes (crypto-cards, investing/staking, NFTs, wallets/compare) were intentional scope cleanup

sections.title: Data Pipeline
items: 6 public API routes confirmed present: /api/fear-greed (TTL 600s), /api/trending (TTL 300s), /api/market-dominance (TTL 300s), /api/market-metrics (TTL 60s), /api/prices (TTL 60s), /api/health
All routes follow standard pattern: fresh cache → external API → stale cache → hardcoded fallback
Cache-Control headers set correctly with s-maxage + stale-while-revalidate on all routes
Direct live health check unavailable (egress proxy blocks degen0x.com from sandbox) — no rate limit hits or fallback triggers detectable from logs
market-metrics route aggregates fear-greed + market cap + volume + BTC dominance in a single 60s cached call — efficient
No stale data issues or API outage signals in codebase or build logs

sections.title: DevOps
items: Production deployment FmTjefK4y: READY — Latest, Current — deployed 36 min ago
Source: commit d3bce36 (main) — 'publish: Day 15 — promote 3 learn guides to production'
Build time: 4m 13s — within normal range for 321-page site
3 build warnings: (1) NODE_OPTIONS env flag — intentional, (2) Next.js 16.1.6 webpack banner — informational, (3) 'Found lockfile missing swc dependencies' — NON-BLOCKING, webpack fallback active
SWC warning: run `next` locally to auto-patch lockfile — low priority but should be resolved next sprint
⚠️ ATTENTION: Vercel Pro Trial expires in 10 days — payment method required to avoid service interruption
Runtime config healthy: Node.js 24.x, Fluid Compute ON, Cold Start Prevention ON, Skew Protection ON (12h)

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Sprint 59 shipped: App Store v2 — 176 dApps, ecosystem tabs, trending + browse view (major milestone)
Day 15 publish: 3 learn guides promoted to production — queue now empty

Total shipped this cycle: 70+ /ecosystem/* pages, 25+ /learn/* articles, 12+ new tools + gamification routes, portfolio live dashboard, on-chain analytics, courses hub, referral system, NFT badge system
Carry-over blockers: (1) structured-data.examples.ts JSX-in-.ts TS errors need fix, (2) SWC lockfile patch, (3) Vercel billing before 10-day deadline
Next sprint candidates: SEO content for new ecosystem pages, OG images for tool pages, E2E test coverage for Sprint 59 additions
No cross-skill blockers active — all pipelines flowing
